forecast-period.text: Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the late morning. Light winds becoming westerly 15 to 20 km/h in the early afternoon then becoming light in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures around 19.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:30am to 2:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 6 [High]
The chance of morning fog. Sunny afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Sunny. Winds northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h tending westerly during the day then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the south in the morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning easterly during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 21.
Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:40am to 2:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 6 [High]

The chance of fog in the early morning. Sunny day. Light winds becoming northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Sunny. Winds west to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h turning south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Partly cloudy. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending easterly during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Cloudy. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures around 20.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:50am to 2:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 5 [Moderate]

The chance of morning fog. Sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming northwest to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then tending south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then tending easterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the late morning. Winds northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending westerly 15 to 25 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low 20s.
No Rating
Sun protection 9:30am to 2:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 5 [Moderate]

The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower south of Keith in the afternoon and evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Light winds becoming northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then turning west to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, becoming less likely in the afternoon. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h becoming light in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures around 20.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:30am to 2:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 5 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog in the north. Medium chance of showers in the south, slight chance elsewhere. Winds northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending westerly 15 to 25 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog near the eastern border. High chance of showers in the south, medium chance elsewhere. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h turning west to southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Slight chance of a shower in the morning. Mostly sunny afternoon. Winds southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning south to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Partly cloudy. Light winds. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low 20s.
No Rating
Sun protection 9:30am to 2:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 6 [High]
The chance of morning fog. Sunny afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Sunny. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h shifting south to southwesterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Cloudy. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low 20s.
No Rating
Sun protection 9:40am to 2:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 5 [Moderate]
The chance of morning fog. Sunny afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Sunny. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h shifting west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the southwest in the morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the early afternoon then becoming light in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low 20s.
No Rating
Sun protection 9:40am to 2:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 6 [High]
The chance of morning fog. Sunny afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Sunny. Light winds becoming west to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then tending west to southwesterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to high 20s.

Cloud clearing. The chance of morning fog in the north. Light winds becoming south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon then tending east to southeasterly during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching 20 to 25.
Mostly sunny. Light winds becoming southeast to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late afternoon then becoming light in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low to mid 20s.
No Rating
Sun protection 9:30am to 3:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 6 [High]
Sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Hawker. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Sunny. Light winds becoming northwest to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Sunny. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending southeast to southwesterly during the day then tending east to southeasterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching 22 to 29.
Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming southeast to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the early afternoon then becoming light in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low to high 20s.
No Rating
Sun protection 9:50am to 3:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 6 [High]

The chance of morning fog. Sunny afternoon. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning north to northwesterly in the late morning then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Streaky Bay. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northwest to southwesterly during the day then tending east to southeasterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching 27 to 33.

Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Streaky Bay. Slight chance of a shower west of Nullarbor, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds easterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northeasterly during the day then tending easterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching 27 to 32.
Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming southeast to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the early afternoon then becoming light in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low 20s.
No Rating
Sun protection 9:40am to 3:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 6 [High]
The chance of morning fog. Sunny afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid 20s.

Sunny. The chance of morning fog in the south. Winds west to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h shifting south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.

The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny day. Light winds becoming east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low 20s.
No Rating
Sun protection 9:50am to 3:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 5 [Moderate]

The chance of morning fog. Sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then tending northwest to southwesterly in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid 20s.

The chance of morning fog. Sunny afternoon. Winds west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h shifting south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to high 20s.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog near the west coast. Winds southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning easterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Sunny. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the middle of the day. Daytime maximum temperatures 24 to 29.
No Rating
Sun protection 9:30am to 3:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]

Sunny. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Sunny. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the day then becoming northeast to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Sunny. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northeasterly during the morning then tending northeast to southeasterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 12 and 16 with daytime temperatures reaching 29 to 34.
Sunny. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending south to southeasterly in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures 23 to 28.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:20am to 3:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]
Sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Yunta. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching 24 to 30.

Sunny. Winds northeast to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending southeast to southwesterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.
Sunny. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 16 with daytime temperatures reaching 24 to 32.
